excluded_content.reason: Row-level or large raw data should not be flattened into answer-ready retrieval text.
Structured artifact tables and draft templates are represented by governed summaries or registry/source entries instead of raw row dumps.
Binary figures are not turned into retrieval text in WP5.
WP5 uses source inventory summaries and documentation, not raw code-body dumps, for governed retrieval preparation.

included_content.description: Truth entries, drift items, phase entries, glossary terms, and source inventory entries are eligible because they are already governed and structured.
README, artifact guide, navigator docs, and navigator notes are eligible as section-level documentation chunks.
Small metadata and contract JSON files are eligible as summarized retrieval documents with caveats where needed.

special_handling.handling: Represented as stub source entries only. Content is not ingested because it is not locally readable in this repo.
Included with caveats because the files contain machine-specific path provenance that should be preserved but not over-generalized.
